Emerson Royal on the Verge of AC Milan Exit: Agent Expected in Italy
arts.sum: AC Milan's Emerson Royal appears to be on the brink of departure from the club, with his agent expected to arrive in Italy to finalize the details of a potential transfer. Calciomerato report that the Brazilian right-back, who joined Milan last summer, is likely to leave before the end of the January transfer window, which closes on February 3rd. arts.ttl: AC Milan agree loan deal to sign Kyle Walker
arts.sum: AC Milan have agreed deal to sign Kyle Walker on loan from Manchester City. Pep Guardiola confirmed earlier this month that Walker had expressed a desire to leave City in the January transfer window.
